subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received and was graced by Our gaze and favored with Our hearing. Praise be to God that the clamor of the nations hath not withheld thee from the Ancient King [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات رسید و بلحاظ فائز و باصغا مشرف لله الحمد ضوضای امم ترا از مالک قدم و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of prayer, @goodly deeds; actions, @service to others; to the Cause of God
